use clap::Parser;

#[derive(Parser)]
struct Cli {
    #[arg(long)]
    input: String,
}

pub fn process_files(input_dir: &str) -> std::io::Result<()> {
    for entry in std::fs::read_dir(input_dir)? {
        let path = entry?.path();
        let _ = std::fs::read_to_string(&path);
    }
    Ok(())
}

fn main() {
    let cli = Cli::parse();
    if let Err(e) = process_files(&cli.input) {
        eprintln!("error: {e}");
        std::process::exit(1);
    }
}

#[cfg(test)]
mod tests {
    use super::*;

    #[test]
    fn test_process() {
        process_files("/tmp").ok();
    }
}
